---
name: Docs Update
about: Report a docs issue or suggest a docs improvement
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Page

Which page or section is this about? Paste the URL if possible.

## Problem

What's wrong or missing? e.g. outdated, unclear, broken link, typo, missing example, wrong screenshot.

## Suggested Change

What should it say instead? A rough wording or bullet points is fine — no need for a full PR.

## Additional Context

Anything else worth knowing (uniTerm version, OS, related issues, screenshots).

---

## 相关页面

涉及哪个页面或章节？如可以，请贴上链接。

## 问题描述

哪里有问题或缺失？例如：内容过时、表述不清、链接失效、错别字、缺少示例、截图错误等。

## 建议修改

应该改成什么？大致文字或要点即可，不必提交完整 PR。

## 补充说明

其他有用的信息（uniTerm 版本、操作系统、相关 issue、截图等）。
